parents.subject: LU-16139 statahead: avoid to block ptlrpcd interpret context

commit.subject: LU-13175 tests: sanity/803 to sync MDTs for actual statfs
commit.message:
LU-13175 tests: sanity/803 to sync MDTs for actual statfs

as number of dnodes is updated at commit.
